title: senna silvestris var. unifaria
intro: Senna silvestris var. unifaria is a variant of the Senna silvestris plant, commonly known as the wild senna or cassia. This plant is a type of legume that is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative effect, which is due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The medicinal properties of Senna silvestris var. unifaria are used to treat various health conditions, including constipation, digestive problems, and liver and gallbladder issues, with its health benefits including improved bowel movements and relief from bloating. Herbal preparations of Senna silvestris var. unifaria include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used under medical supervision to alleviate these health issues.
